summary: Comprehensive testing of Remy educational platform completed. Backend APIs 100% passing (19/19 tests). Frontend UI fully functional with LaTeX/KaTeX rendering working correctly.

issues: Quiz dialog overlay remains open after submitting - blocks background navigation until pressing escape or clicking outside. This is expected Radix UI behavior but could be improved by auto-closing on error.

critical_code_review_comments: Desmos API shows trial key warning in console - needs production key for commercial use
Quiz start endpoint correctly validates question availability and returns helpful error message
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: 1) Student flow (Biblioteca → CourseViewer → LessonViewer with 76 KaTeX formulas rendered), 2) Formulas page with 20 KaTeX formulas and search, 3) Simulacros with quiz creation dialog and proper error handling for insufficient questions, 4) Progreso with stats tabs and achievements, 5) Admin login/dashboard. Database has: 1 course, 2 chapters, 1 lesson, 10 formulas, 5 questions (2 Derivadas, 1 Integrales, 1 Vectores, 1 Cinemática).

student_flow.biblioteca_to_course_viewer: PASS - Navigation from Biblioteca to CourseViewer works
student_flow.course_viewer_to_lesson_viewer: PASS - Can navigate to lesson with LaTeX content
student_flow.katex_latex_rendering: PASS - 76 KaTeX formulas rendered in lesson

formulas_page.display: PASS - 20 KaTeX formulas displayed with proper rendering

simulacros_page.create_quiz_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with course/topic/question count inputs
simulacros_page.error_handling: PASS - Shows 'Solo hay 2 preguntas disponibles para este tema' when requesting more questions than available
simulacros_page.quiz_history: PASS - Empty quiz history displayed correctly

progreso_page.stats_display: PASS - Shows 28 lecciones, 8 simulacros, 87% promedio, 7 días de racha

admin_login.dashboard: PASS - Shows stats: Cursos=1, Fórmulas=10, Preguntas=5, Usuarios=0
